title: CodeChicken Lib
description: Contains various libraries for 3D math and transformations, rendering, networking, configs, and much, much more.
body:
Library mod for Chicken-Bones mods.

Contains various libraries for 3D math and transformations, rendering, networking, configs, and much, much more.

Please see our GitHub repository for maven/dependency information if you wish to use this yourself.

We are partnered with [CreeperHost](https://www.creeperhost.net/partner/covers1624vpp)! Use promo code `covers1624vpp` at checkout for 15% off your first month
